Container.Name: Backblaze64
Container.Overview: Backblaze Personal Backup running under Wine (64-bit Windows environment) on Ubuntu 24.04. Provides a web-based GUI via browser or VNC. Automatically keeps Backblaze updated to the latest version on each restart.
Container.DonateText: If Backblaze 64 is useful to you, sponsorship is hugely appreciated and helps keep it maintained.

Config.Name: VNC Port
Config.Description: Port for direct VNC client access.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the Wine prefix and Backblaze configuration. Must survive container restarts.

Config.Name: Backup Source (Drive D)
Config.Description: Optional: map a host path to back up as drive D. Must be read-write: Backblaze creates a .bzvol folder in the drive's root to track and back it up. Repeat with /drive_e, /drive_f, etc. for additional locations.

Config.Name: User ID
Config.Description: UID the app runs as. On Unraid this is normally 99 (nobody), which matches user-share ownership - the app must own the files it backs up, since Backblaze writes a .bzvol folder into each drive's root. Change only if your data is owned by a different user (check with: id -u).

Config.Name: Group ID
Config.Description: GID the app runs as. On Unraid this is normally 100 (users), matching user-share ownership. Change only if your data is owned by a different group (check with: id -g).

Config.Name: Disable Auto-Update
Config.Description: Set to true to skip the Backblaze version check on startup (faster boot, but won't auto-update).

Config.Name: Disable Virtual Desktop
Config.Description: Set to true to disable Wine's virtual desktop mode.
